title: hieracium racemosum subsp. apenninum
intro: Hieracium racemosum subsp. apenninum is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Apennine Mountains in Italy. It possesses medicinal properties due to its rich content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium racemosum subsp. apenninum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
